name: I am at a Persian bay
description: I am at a Persian bay
hints: The Persian bay where your ship is docked. This is your gateway to the sea voyage.
GO SHIP to board your vessel and begin sailing. Make sure you have the compass and telescope first!
Board the ship (GO SHIP), then RAISE ANCHOR and SAIL with compass directions to navigate. EAST returns to the city for more supplies.

effects: Message: Surprised merchant grabs it and runs like a thief!

notes: The Persian bay with your ship. GO SHIP to board (takes you to room 6, the ship deck). A merchant is here too. East returns to the city (room 3). Make sure to collect compass, telescope, and other supplies before sailing.
